data.raceName: JERICHO CUP ANZAC LONG WEEKEND MAIDEN
data.raceComments: {"comment":"3. I LOVE YA MONEY is a Gingerbread Man gelding who makes his debut. Will be improved off a recent second of nine trial placing over 1000m at Belmont Park and should run a bold race fresh-up. Should attract strong betting support. 10. PEIGI is a filly by A Lot out of Margays who is at the races for the first time today. Trained here and having placed third of nine in a recent trial over 600m at this track is worth considering. 4. DARK OPAL resumes from a spell of nine weeks. Placed third of 10 fresh-up at Ascot over 1000m last prep and having won a recent seven runner trial over 950m at Lark Hill is an each-way chance. 5. STARCHASER resumes from a spell and is having her first start for a new stable. She has placed fresh-up over today's distance in the past and is a must include in exotic bets.","runners":[3,10,4,5],"exclusive":true}
